inline_comments.message: Do we need licence info here?

I receive test failure for this method: 

Expected :Basic YWRtaW46YWRtaW4=
Actual   :/enricher/v11/cloud-infrastructure/vservers/vserver/{0}?sot=!aai
License is required in java files and scripts - it's optional here and in property files

Test passes for me and for the Jenkins sanity job

https://jenkins.onap.org/view/sdnc/job/sdnc-apps-master-verify-java/12/consoleFull


21:04:22 Tests run: 9, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0, Time elapsed: 9.23 sec - in org.onap.sdnc.apps.pomba.networkdiscovery.unittest.service.NetworkDiscoveryTest

I can look at your environment to see if I can find an issue.

Yes, sorry the casablanca version of the logging specs including MDC's is still being reviewed - see https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/57171/4/reference/logging-kubernetes/logdemonode/charts/logdemonode/resources/config/logback.xml

There are 2 options
1) use the MDC's below as the log pattern - but the ELK stack will not index them properly until we merge the config changes for the log pod

2) use the updated logback.xml which is mostly a copy of portal/policy - for the 4 files audit, metrics, error, debug - where debug has a mix of old and new-mdc patterns

https://wiki.onap.org/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=28378955#ONAPApplicationLoggingSpecificationv1.2(Casablanca)-Logback.xml
